response:
source
The initial setup requires defining a variable to accumulate the sum of squares starting at zero.
***
Next we must initialize another variable for the product of cubes which begins at one to handle empty lists.
***
We then iterate through each integer in the provided slice to perform the necessary mathematical operations.
***
During the loop we add the square of the current number to our running sum variable.
***
Simultaneously we multiply the cube of the current number into our running product variable.
***
Finally the function returns an array containing the calculated sum and product as the result.
